text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A visitor barrels into the prep room just before
the Takarazuka Kinen is set to begin.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: A-A-Ayabeee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud, thud, thud!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Doto, of all times...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Are you okay? Does anything hurt?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: N-nooo! I-I'm fine!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I can... I can stand up on my own.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Uh... yes, I'm okay. Um...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: You're so cool, Ayabe.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
You're really cool. You're also so smart, honest,
calm... and strong.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I think you're pretty amazing. ...I've always
thought so.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Doto...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I... I don't really have any confidence. I'm clumsy
and wimpy. I'm just no good in general... But that
means I'm also no good at giving up.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I should just learn from my failures and move on,
but instead I just keep trying and failing. I fail and
fail and fail...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: But it's not like I enjoy being so awful... I wanted to change.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I-I... I just...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I wanted to be like Opera O.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to, but I can't. I can't be anything like
her...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: But I never gave up!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Then, one day... Opera O called my name.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Right there, right after the spring Tenno Sho. She
said she's been waiting all this time... just for me.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: S-so, that's why...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Today... I have to beat you, Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: That way I can... I can... I can be Opera O's rival!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: And... I really mean it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto has made her lengthy confession
known.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Listening in complete silence, Admire Vega then
gives a firm response.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Look, I know you're feeling very passionate right
now, but I don't recall myself participating in any
of that opera fanatic's ridiculous antics.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: So if you're aiming to be her rival, go right ahead.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: But I'm not going to lose this race.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Only a select few can participate in the
Takarazuka Kinen. It's the spring Grand Prix.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...It's something she can be proud of.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Yielding is not an option. I will win—that much is
certain.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: A-all right... I mean, good!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With each runner clinging to their hopes, the
beginning of the race draws near.
